title: Credit Card Payoff With $300 Extra Payment — TheDailyo
h1: Credit Card Payoff With $300 Extra Payment
subtitle: See how adding $300/month changes payoff time and interest.
description: Calculate how an extra $300 monthly payment affects your credit card payoff timeline, interest paid, and total cost.
howItWorksHtml: This page pre-fills an extra $300/month. Larger extra payments reduce principal quickly, which typically cuts interest costs substantially.

faq.a: It depends on your budget. If it’s not sustainable, try smaller amounts and compare. Consistency matters.
Usually: stop new charges, pay as much as possible, and prioritize highest-interest debt (avalanche) while keeping minimums on others.

faq.q: Can I model a payoff goal date?
faq.a: Not directly on this version, but you can adjust payment/extra until the payoff timeline matches your goal.

related.title: Fastest Way to Pay Off Credit Cards

affiliate.headline: Lower your APR and pay off faster
